version_description: Debarge - Rhythm Of The Night - - Link https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cAQSZhazYk8.

versions.version_description: Corrected, timed chords and lyrics, relabeled sections, performance notes and related counting, suggested strum patterns.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
No Capo

[Intro]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]Dsus2[/ch]      [ch]Am7[/ch]
1    +    2    +    3     +    4     +[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                              [ch]G/B[/ch]
1    +    2    +    3     +    4     +[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]Dsus2[/ch]      [ch]Am7[/ch]
1    +    2    +    3     +    4     +[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                              [ch]G/B[/ch]
1    +    2    +    3     +    4     +[/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]G/B[/ch]
  When it feels like the world is on your shoulders[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]G/B[/ch]
  And all of the madness has got you going crazy[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G/B[/ch]
  It's time to get out, step out into the street[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]G/B[/ch]
  Where all of the action is right there at your feet[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]       [ch]A/E[/ch]                           [ch]G/B[/ch]        [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
  Well, I know a place where we can dance the whole night away[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
  Underneath electric stars[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]A/C#[/ch]                          [ch]G/B[/ch]             [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
  Just come with me and we can shake your blues right away[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]D[/ch]                                    [ch]A[/ch]
  You'll be doing fine when the music starts, oh[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]A7[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
  To the beat of the rhythm  of the night, dance until the morning light[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]A7[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]
  Forget about the worries on your mind, you can leave them all behind[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
  To the beat of the rhythm of the night[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
  Oh, the rhythm of the night, oh yeah[/tab]

[Interlude]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]Dsus2[/ch]      [ch]Am7[/ch]
1    +    2    +    3     +    4     +[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                              [ch]G/B[/ch]
1    +    2    +    3     +    4     +[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]Dsus2[/ch]      [ch]Am7[/ch]
1    +    2    +    3     +    4     +[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                              [ch]G/B[/ch]
1    +    2    +    3     +    4     +[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                            [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]G/B[/ch]
  Look out on the street now, the party's just beginning[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]G/B[/ch]
  The music's playing, a celebration's starting[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]G/B[/ch]
  Under the street lights, the scene is being set[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]G/B[/ch]
  A night for romance, a night you won't forget[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]       [ch]A/E[/ch]                              [ch]G/B[/ch]         [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
  So, come join the fun, this ain't no time to be staying home[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]                           [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
  Ooh, there's too much going on[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]A/E[/ch]                       [ch]G/B[/ch]         [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
  Tonight is gonna be a night like you've never known[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]D[/ch]                                            [ch]A[/ch]
  We're gonna have a good time the whole night long[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]A7[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
  To the beat of the rhythm  of the night, dance until the morning light[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]A7[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]
  Forget about the worries on your mind, you can leave them all behind[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
  To the beat of the rhythm of the night[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
  Oh, the rhythm of the night, oh yeah[/tab]

[Interlude]
[ch]Bm[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]
[ch]D[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]

[ch]Bm[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]
[ch]D[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]

[Pre-Hook]
[tab]       [ch]A/E[/ch]                              [ch]G/B[/ch]         [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
  So, come join the fun, this ain't no time to be staying home[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]                           [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
  Ooh, there's too much going on[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]A/E[/ch]                       [ch]G/B[/ch]         [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
  Tonight is gonna be a night like you've never known[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]D[/ch]                                            [ch]A[/ch]
  We're gonna have a good time the whole night long[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]          [ch]E[/ch]            [ch]Esus4[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]B[/ch]              [ch]B7[/ch]              [ch]E[/ch]
  To the beat of the rhythm  of the night, dance until the morning light[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]E[/ch]        [ch]Esus4[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]B[/ch]              [ch]B7[/ch]              [ch]E[/ch]
  Forget about the worries on your mind, you can leave them all behind[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]E[/ch]            [ch]Esus4[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]B[/ch]              [ch]B7[/ch]              [ch]E[/ch]
  To the beat of the rhythm  of the night, dance until the morning light[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]E[/ch]        [ch]Esus4[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]B[/ch]   [ch]B7[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]
  Forget about the worries on your mind[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]E[/ch]            [ch]Esus4[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]B[/ch]              [ch]B7[/ch]              [ch]E[/ch]
  To the beat of the rhythm of the night, (oh baby, I'm crying)[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]E[/ch]            [ch]Esus4[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]B[/ch]              [ch]B7[/ch]              [ch]E[/ch]
  Forget about the worries on your mind[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]E[/ch]            [ch]Esus4[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]B[/ch]              [ch]B7[/ch]              [ch]E[/ch]
  To the beat of the rhythm of the night, (oh baby)[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]E[/ch]            [ch]Esus4[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]B[/ch]              [ch]B7[/ch]              [ch]E[/ch]
  Forget about the worries on your mind[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab]   [ch]E[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]B[/ch]
  Laaaaaa,la   la  lalala[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]B[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]B[/ch]
  Laaaaaa,la   la  lalala[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]E[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]B[/ch]
  Laaaaaa,la   la  lalala  The music's playing[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]B[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]B[/ch]
  (It's a celebration)[/tab]
  Laaaaaa,la   la  lalala The music's playing  Everybody dance

[Outro]
[tab]          [ch]E[/ch]            [ch]Esus4[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]B[/ch]              [ch]B7[/ch]        [ch]E[/ch]
  to the beat of the rhythm of the night   ohohoooohoohoohooooooo[/tab]

  To the beat of the rhythm of the night, dance until the morning light[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]E[/ch]        [ch]Esus4[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]B[/ch]              [ch]B7[/ch]              [ch]E[/ch]
  Forget about the worries on your mind, you can leave them all behind[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]E[/ch]            [ch]Esus4[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]B[/ch]              [ch]B7[/ch]              [ch]E[/ch]
